suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The feature had to relax `backend-worker` so CLI-only validation is allowed, but the skill still presents web-server-specific implementation examples (`src/web_server/models.rs`, `handlers.rs`) inside the generic procedure. That makes the procedure partially misleading for CLI-focused backend tasks and likely contributed to the worker needing to justify a deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:25-35 still anchors implementation guidance around `src/web_server/*` even after adding CLI validation language; handoff.skillFeedback for `c2175d33-b819-49cd-8512-502f0379f1c6` reports a procedure deviation because the prior guidance conflicted with this mission.
